# Karting Apartment

> Licensed 60 m² holiday apartment in Castel Mella, Lombardy, Italy — ideal for karting fans and peaceful stays near Lake Iseo, Brescia and Northern Italy.

Karting Apartment is a professionally managed short-term rental operated by MI ISEO LAKE HOUSE. Book direct for the best rate, or via Booking.com and Airbnb.

## Quick facts

- **Name:** Karting Apartment
- **Type:** Vacation rental / apartment (60 m²)
- **Capacity:** Up to 4 guests · 1 bedroom · living room with kitchenette
- **Address:** Via Onzato 16, 25030 Castel Mella (BS), Lombardy, Italy
- **Coordinates:** 45.5084261, 10.1488191
- **Guest rating:** 9.7 / 10 (Booking.com)
- **License:** 017042-LNI-00002
- **Check-in:** 14:00–20:00 · **Check-out:** by 10:00
- **Manager:** MI ISEO LAKE HOUSE — https://www.miiseolakehouse.com/

## Location highlights

- Castel Mella, Province of Brescia, Lombardy
- Minutes from world-class karting tracks (e.g. Franciacorta, South Garda Karting)
- Lake Iseo, Franciacorta wine region, Brescia and Bergamo within easy reach
- Airports: Bergamo Orio al Serio, Verona, Milan Linate and Malpensa accessible by car

## Amenities

Free WiFi · Free private parking · Air conditioning · Fully equipped kitchenette · Washing machine · Non-smoking · Allergy-friendly options · Airport shuttle on request
